text: How doth the city<S>5892</S> sit<S>3427</S> solitary<S>910</S>, that was full<S>7227</S> of people<S>5971</S>! She is become as a widow<S>490</S>, that was great<S>7227</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>! She that was a princess<S>8282</S> among the provinces<S>4082</S> is become tributary<S>4522</S>!

She weepeth<S>1058</S> sore<S>1058</S> in the night<S>3915</S>, and her tears<S>1832</S> are on her cheeks<S>3895</S>; Among all her lovers<S>157</S> she hath none to comfort<S>5162</S> her<S>7453</S>: All her friends have dealt treacherously<S>898</S> with her<S>341</S>; they are become her enemies.

Judah<S>3063</S> is gone into captivity<S>1540</S> because of affliction<S>6040</S>, and because of great<S>7230</S> servitude<S>5656</S>; She dwelleth<S>3427</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>, she findeth<S>4672</S> no rest<S>4494</S>: All her persecutors<S>7291</S> overtook<S>5381</S> her within the straits<S>4712</S>.

The ways<S>1870</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> do mourn<S>57</S>, because none come<S>935</S> to the solemn assembly<S>4150</S>; All her gates<S>8179</S> are desolate<S>8074</S>, her priests<S>3548</S> do sigh<S>584</S>: Her virgins<S>1330</S> are afflicted<S>3013</S>, and she herself is in bitterness<S>4843</S>.

Her adversaries<S>6862</S> are become the head<S>7218</S>, her enemies<S>341</S> prosper<S>7951</S>; For Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath afflicted<S>3013</S> her for the multitude<S>7230</S> of her transgressions<S>6588</S>: Her young children<S>5768</S> are gone<S>1980</S> into captivity<S>7628</S> before<S>6440</S> the adversary<S>6862</S>.

And from the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> all her majesty<S>1926</S> is departed<S>3318</S>: Her princes<S>8269</S> are become like harts<S>354</S> that find<S>4672</S> no pasture<S>4829</S>, And they are gone<S>3212</S> without strength<S>3581</S> before<S>6440</S> the pursuer<S>7291</S>.

Jerusalem<S>3389</S> remembereth<S>2142</S> in the days<S>3117</S> of her affliction<S>6040</S> and of her miseries<S>4788</S> all her pleasant things<S>4262</S> that were from the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>6924</S>: When her people<S>5971</S> fell<S>5307</S> into the hand<S>3027</S> of the adversary<S>6862</S>, and none did help<S>5826</S> her<S>6862</S>, The adversaries saw<S>7200</S> her<S>7832</S>, they did mock at her desolations<S>4868</S>.

Jerusalem<S>3389</S> hath grievously<S>2399</S> sinned<S>2398</S>; therefore she is become<S>5206</S> as an unclean thing<S>3513</S>; All that honored her despise<S>2107</S> her<S>7200</S>, because they have seen her nakedness<S>6172</S>: Yea<S>584</S>, she sigheth, and turneth<S>7725</S> backward<S>268</S>.

Her filthiness<S>2932</S> was in her skirts<S>7757</S>; she remembered<S>2142</S> not her latter end<S>319</S>; Therefore is she come down<S>3381</S> wonderfully<S>6382</S>; she hath no comforter<S>5162</S>: Behold<S>7200</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, my affliction<S>6040</S>; for the enemy<S>341</S> hath magnified himself<S>1431</S>.

The adversary<S>6862</S> hath spread out<S>6566</S> his hand<S>3027</S> upon all her pleasant things<S>4261</S>: For she hath seen<S>7200</S> that the nations<S>1471</S> are entered<S>935</S> into her sanctuary<S>4720</S>, Concerning whom thou didst command<S>6680</S> that they should not enter<S>935</S> into thine assembly<S>6951</S>.

All her people<S>5971</S> sigh<S>584</S>, they seek<S>1245</S> bread<S>3899</S>; They have given<S>5414</S> their pleasant things<S>4261</S> for food<S>400</S> to refresh<S>7725</S> the soul<S>5315</S>: See<S>7200</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and behold<S>5027</S>; for I am become abject<S>2151</S>.

Is it nothing to you<S>5674</S>, all ye that pass by<S>1870</S>? Behold<S>5027</S>, and see<S>7200</S> if there be<S>3426</S> any sorrow<S>4341</S> like unto my sorrow<S>4341</S>, which is brought<S>5953</S> upon me<S>3068</S>, Wherewith Jehovah hath afflicted<S>3013</S> me in the day<S>3117</S> of his fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S>.

From on high<S>4791</S> hath he sent<S>7971</S> fire<S>784</S> into my bones<S>6106</S>, and it prevaileth<S>7287</S> against them<S>6566</S>; He hath spread a net<S>7568</S> for my feet<S>7272</S>, he hath turned<S>7725</S> me back<S>268</S>: He hath made<S>5414</S> me desolate<S>8074</S> and faint<S>1739</S> all the day<S>3117</S>.

The yoke<S>5923</S> of my transgressions<S>6588</S> is bound<S>8244</S> by his hand<S>3027</S>; They are knit<S>8276</S> together<S>5927</S>, they are come up upon my neck<S>6677</S>; He hath made my strength<S>3581</S> to fail<S>3782</S>: The Lord<S>136</S> hath delivered<S>5414</S> me into their hands<S>3027</S>, against whom I am not able<S>3201</S> to stand<S>6965</S>.

The Lord<S>136</S> hath set at nought<S>5541</S> all my mighty<S>47</S> men in the midst<S>7130</S> of me<S>7121</S>; He hath called a solemn assembly<S>4150</S> against me to crush<S>7665</S> my young men<S>970</S>: The Lord<S>136</S> hath trodden<S>1869</S> as in a winepress<S>1660</S> the virgin<S>1330</S> daughter<S>1323</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>.

For these things I weep<S>1058</S>; mine eye<S>5869</S>, mine eye<S>5869</S> runneth down<S>3381</S> with water<S>4325</S>; Because the comforter<S>5162</S> that should refresh<S>7725</S> my soul<S>5315</S> is far<S>7368</S> from me<S>1121</S>: My children are desolate<S>8074</S>, because the enemy<S>341</S> hath prevailed<S>1396</S>.

Zion<S>6726</S> spreadeth forth<S>6566</S> her hands<S>3027</S>; there is none to comfort<S>5162</S> her<S>3068</S>; Jehovah hath commanded<S>6680</S> concerning Jacob<S>3290</S>, that they that are round about<S>5439</S> him should be his adversaries<S>6862</S>: Jerusalem<S>3389</S> is among them as an unclean thing<S>5079</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> is righteous<S>6662</S>; for I have rebelled<S>4784</S> against his commandment<S>6310</S>: Hear<S>8085</S>, I pray you<S>5971</S>, all ye peoples, and behold<S>7200</S> my sorrow<S>4341</S>: My virgins<S>1330</S> and my young men<S>970</S> are gone<S>1980</S> into captivity<S>7628</S>.

I called<S>7121</S> for my lovers<S>157</S>, but they deceived<S>7411</S> me<S>3548</S>: My priests and mine elders<S>2205</S> gave up the ghost<S>1478</S> in the city<S>5892</S>, While they sought<S>1245</S> them food<S>400</S> to refresh<S>7725</S> their souls<S>5315</S>.

Behold<S>7200</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>; for I am in distress<S>6887</S>; my heart<S>4578</S> is troubled<S>2560</S>; My heart<S>3820</S> is turned<S>2015</S> within<S>7130</S> me<S>4784</S>; for I have grievously rebelled<S>4784</S>: Abroad<S>2351</S> the sword<S>2719</S> bereaveth<S>7921</S>, at home<S>1004</S> there is as death<S>4194</S>.

They have heard<S>8085</S> that I sigh<S>584</S>; there is none to comfort<S>5162</S> me<S>341</S>; all mine enemies have heard<S>8085</S> of my trouble<S>7451</S>; they are glad<S>7797</S> that thou hast done<S>6213</S> it<S>935</S>: Thou wilt bring the day<S>3117</S> that thou hast proclaimed<S>7121</S>, and they shall be like unto me<S>3644</S>.

Let all their wickedness<S>7451</S> come<S>935</S> before<S>6440</S> thee<S>5953</S>; And do unto them<S>5953</S>, as thou hast done unto me for all my transgressions<S>6588</S>: For my sighs<S>585</S> are many<S>7227</S>, and my heart<S>3820</S> is faint<S>1742</S>.

How hath the Lord<S>136</S> covered<S>5743</S> the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> with a cloud<S>5743</S> in his anger<S>639</S>! He hath cast down<S>7993</S> from heaven<S>8064</S> unto the earth<S>776</S> the beauty<S>8597</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, And hath not remembered<S>2142</S> his footstool<S>1916</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of his anger<S>639</S>.

The Lord<S>136</S> hath swallowed up<S>1104</S> all the habitations<S>4999</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and hath not pitied<S>2550</S>: He hath thrown down<S>2040</S> in his wrath<S>5678</S> the strongholds<S>4013</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>; He hath brought them down<S>5060</S> to the ground<S>776</S>; he hath profaned<S>2490</S> the kingdom<S>4467</S> and the princes thereof<S>8269</S>.

He hath cut off<S>1438</S> in fierce<S>2750</S> anger<S>639</S> all the horn<S>7161</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>; He hath drawn<S>7725</S> back<S>268</S> his right hand<S>3225</S> from before<S>6440</S> the enemy<S>341</S>: And he hath burned<S>1197</S> up Jacob<S>3290</S> like a flaming<S>3852</S> fire<S>784</S>, which devoureth<S>398</S> round about<S>5439</S>.

He hath bent<S>1869</S> his bow<S>7198</S> like an enemy<S>341</S>, he hath stood<S>5324</S> with his right hand<S>3225</S> as an adversary<S>6862</S>, And hath slain<S>2026</S> all that were pleasant<S>4261</S> to the eye<S>5869</S>: In the tent<S>168</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> he hath poured out<S>8210</S> his wrath<S>2534</S> like fire<S>784</S>.

The Lord<S>136</S> is become as an enemy<S>341</S>, he hath swallowed up<S>1104</S> Israel<S>3478</S>; He hath swallowed up<S>1104</S> all her palaces<S>759</S>, he hath destroyed<S>7843</S> his strongholds<S>4013</S>; And he hath multiplied<S>7235</S> in the daughter<S>1323</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> mourning<S>8386</S> and lamentation<S>592</S>.

And he hath violently taken away<S>2554</S> his tabernacle<S>7900</S>, as if it were of a garden<S>1588</S>; he hath destroyed<S>7843</S> his place of assembly<S>4150</S>: Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath caused solemn assembly<S>4150</S> and sabbath<S>7676</S> to be forgotten<S>7911</S> in Zion<S>6726</S>, And hath despised<S>5006</S> in the indignation<S>2195</S> of his anger<S>639</S> the king<S>4428</S> and the priest<S>3548</S>.

The Lord<S>136</S> hath cast off<S>2186</S> his altar<S>4196</S>, he hath abhorred<S>5010</S> his sanctuary<S>4720</S>; He hath given up<S>5462</S> into the hand<S>3027</S> of the enemy<S>341</S> the walls<S>2346</S> of her palaces<S>759</S>: They have made<S>5414</S> a noise<S>6963</S> in the house<S>1004</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, as in the day<S>3117</S> of a solemn assembly<S>4150</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath purposed<S>2803</S> to destroy<S>7843</S> the wall<S>2346</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>; He hath stretched out<S>5186</S> the line<S>6957</S>, he hath not withdrawn<S>7725</S> his hand<S>3027</S> from destroying<S>1104</S>; And he hath made the rampart<S>2426</S> and wall<S>2346</S> to lament<S>56</S>; they languish<S>535</S> together<S>3162</S>.

Her gates<S>8179</S> are sunk<S>2883</S> into the ground<S>776</S>; he hath destroyed<S>6</S> and broken<S>7665</S> her bars<S>1280</S>: Her king<S>4428</S> and her princes<S>8269</S> are among the nations<S>1471</S> where the law<S>8451</S> is not<S>5030</S>; Yea, her prophets find<S>4672</S> no vision<S>2377</S> from Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

The elders<S>2205</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S> sit<S>3427</S> upon the ground<S>776</S>, they keep silence<S>1826</S>; They have cast up<S>5927</S> dust<S>6083</S> upon their heads<S>7218</S>; They have girded<S>2296</S> themselves with sackcloth<S>8242</S>: The virgins<S>1330</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S> hang down<S>3381</S> their heads<S>7218</S> to the ground<S>776</S>.

Mine eyes<S>5869</S> do fail<S>3615</S> with tears<S>1832</S>, my heart<S>4578</S> is troubled<S>2560</S>; My liver<S>3516</S> is poured<S>8210</S> upon the earth<S>776</S>, because of the destruction<S>7667</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of my people<S>5971</S>, Because the young children<S>5768</S> and the sucklings<S>3243</S> swoon<S>5848</S> in the streets<S>7339</S> of the city<S>7151</S>.

They say<S>559</S> to their mothers<S>517</S>, Where is grain<S>1715</S> and wine<S>3196</S>? When they swoon<S>5848</S> as the wounded<S>2491</S> in the streets<S>7339</S> of the city<S>5892</S>, When their soul<S>5315</S> is poured out<S>8210</S> into their mothers<S>517</S>' bosom<S>2436</S>.

What shall I testify<S>5749</S> unto thee<S>4100</S>? what shall I liken<S>1819</S> to thee<S>1323</S>, O daughter of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>? What shall I compare<S>7737</S> to thee<S>5162</S>, that I may comfort thee<S>1330</S>, O virgin daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>? For thy breach<S>7667</S> is great<S>1419</S> like the sea<S>3220</S>: who can heal thee<S>7495</S>?

Thy prophets<S>5030</S> have seen<S>2372</S> for thee false<S>7723</S> and foolish visions<S>8602</S>; And they have not uncovered<S>1540</S> thine iniquity<S>5771</S>, to bring back<S>7725</S> thy captivity<S>7622</S>, But have seen<S>2372</S> for thee false<S>7723</S> oracles<S>4864</S> and causes of banishment<S>4065</S>.

All that pass<S>5674</S> by clap<S>5606</S> their hands<S>3709</S> at thee<S>1870</S>; They hiss<S>8319</S> and wag<S>5128</S> their head<S>7218</S> at the daughter<S>1323</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, saying<S>5892</S>, Is this the city that men called<S>559</S> The perfection<S>3632</S> of beauty<S>3308</S>, The joy<S>4885</S> of the whole earth<S>776</S>?

All thine enemies<S>341</S> have opened<S>6475</S> their mouth<S>6310</S> wide against thee<S>8319</S>; They hiss and gnash<S>2786</S> the teeth<S>8127</S>; they say<S>559</S>, We have swallowed her up<S>1104</S>; Certainly<S>389</S> this is the day<S>3117</S> that we looked for<S>6960</S>; we have found<S>4672</S>, we have seen it<S>7200</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath done<S>6213</S> that which he purposed<S>2161</S>; He hath fulfilled<S>1214</S> his word<S>565</S> that he commanded<S>6680</S> in the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>6924</S>; He hath thrown down<S>2040</S>, and hath not pitied<S>2550</S>: And he hath caused the enemy<S>341</S> to rejoice<S>8055</S> over thee<S>7311</S>; He hath exalted the horn<S>7161</S> of thine adversaries<S>6862</S>.

Their heart<S>3820</S> cried<S>6817</S> unto the Lord<S>136</S>: O wall<S>2346</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, let tears<S>1832</S> run down<S>3381</S> like a river<S>5158</S> day<S>3119</S> and night<S>3915</S>; Give<S>5414</S> thyself no respite<S>6314</S>; let not the apple<S>1323</S> of thine eye<S>5869</S> cease<S>1826</S>.

Arise<S>6965</S>, cry out<S>7442</S> in the night<S>3915</S>, at the beginning<S>7218</S> of the watches<S>821</S>; Pour out<S>8210</S> thy heart<S>3820</S> like water<S>4325</S> before<S>5227</S> the face<S>6440</S> of the Lord<S>136</S>: Lift up<S>5375</S> thy hands<S>3709</S> toward him for the life<S>5315</S> of thy young children<S>5768</S>, that faint<S>5848</S> for hunger<S>7458</S> at the head<S>7218</S> of every street<S>2351</S>.

See<S>7200</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and behold<S>7200</S> to whom thou hast done<S>5953</S> thus<S>3541</S>! Shall the women<S>802</S> eat<S>398</S> their fruit<S>6529</S>, the children<S>5768</S> that are dandled<S>2949</S> in the hands<S>3548</S>? Shall the priest and the prophet<S>5030</S> be slain<S>2026</S> in the sanctuary<S>4720</S> of the Lord<S>136</S>?

The youth<S>5288</S> and the old<S>2205</S> man lie<S>7901</S> on the ground<S>776</S> in the streets<S>2351</S>; My virgins<S>1330</S> and my young men<S>970</S> are fallen<S>5307</S> by the sword<S>2719</S>: Thou hast slain<S>2026</S> them in the day<S>3117</S> of thine anger<S>639</S>; Thou hast slaughtered<S>2873</S>, and not pitied<S>2550</S>.

Thou hast called<S>7121</S>, as in the day<S>3117</S> of a solemn<S>4150</S> assembly<S>4032</S>, my terrors on every side<S>5439</S>; And there was none that escaped<S>6412</S> or remained<S>8300</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s anger<S>639</S>: Those that I have dandled<S>2946</S> and brought up<S>7235</S> hath mine enemy<S>341</S> consumed<S>3615</S>.
I am the man<S>1397</S> that hath seen<S>7200</S> affliction<S>6040</S> by the rod<S>7626</S> of his wrath<S>5678</S>.
He hath led<S>5090</S> me and caused<S>3212</S> me to walk in darkness<S>2822</S>, and not in light<S>216</S>.
Surely against me he turneth<S>7725</S> his hand<S>3027</S> again<S>2015</S> and again all the day<S>3117</S>.
My flesh<S>1320</S> and my skin<S>5785</S> hath he made old<S>1086</S>; he hath broken<S>7665</S> my bones<S>6106</S>.
He hath builded against<S>1129</S> me<S>5362</S>, and compassed me with gall<S>7219</S> and travail<S>8513</S>.
He hath made<S>3427</S> me to dwell in dark places<S>4285</S>, as those that have been long<S>5769</S> dead<S>4191</S>.
He hath walled<S>1443</S> me about<S>3318</S>, that I cannot go forth; he hath made my chain<S>5178</S> heavy<S>3513</S>.
Yea<S>2199</S>, when I cry, and call<S>2199</S> for help<S>5640</S>, he shutteth out my prayer<S>8605</S>.
He hath walled<S>1443</S> up my ways<S>1870</S> with hewn stone<S>1496</S>; he hath made my paths<S>5410</S> crooked<S>5753</S>.
He is unto me as a bear<S>1677</S> lying in wait<S>693</S>, as a lion<S>738</S> in secret places<S>4565</S>.
He hath turned aside<S>5493</S> my ways<S>1870</S>, and pulled me in pieces<S>6582</S>; he hath made<S>7760</S> me desolate<S>8074</S>.
He hath bent<S>1869</S> his bow<S>7198</S>, and set<S>5324</S> me as a mark<S>4307</S> for the arrow<S>2671</S>.
He hath caused the shafts<S>1121</S> of his quiver<S>827</S> to enter<S>935</S> into my reins<S>3629</S>.
I am become a derision<S>7814</S> to all my people<S>5971</S>, and their song<S>5058</S> all the day<S>3117</S>.
He hath filled<S>7646</S> me with bitterness<S>4844</S>, he hath sated<S>7301</S> me with wormwood<S>3939</S>.
He hath also broken<S>1638</S> my teeth<S>8127</S> with gravel stones<S>2687</S>; he hath covered<S>3728</S> me with ashes<S>665</S>.
And thou hast removed<S>2186</S> my soul<S>5315</S> far off<S>2186</S> from peace<S>7965</S>; I forgat<S>5382</S> prosperity<S>2896</S>.
And I said<S>559</S>, My strength<S>5331</S> is perished<S>6</S>, and mine expectation<S>8431</S> from Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
Remember<S>2142</S> mine affliction<S>6040</S> and my misery<S>4788</S>, the wormwood<S>3939</S> and the gall<S>7219</S>.
My soul<S>5315</S> hath them still<S>2142</S> in remembrance<S>2142</S>, and is bowed down within me<S>7743</S>.
This I recall<S>7725</S> to my mind<S>3820</S>; therefore have I hope<S>3176</S>.
It is of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s lovingkindnesses<S>2617</S> that we are not consumed<S>8552</S>, because his compassions<S>7356</S> fail not<S>3615</S>.
They are new<S>2319</S> every morning<S>1242</S>; great<S>7227</S> is thy faithfulness<S>530</S>.
Jehovah<S>3068</S> is my portion<S>2506</S>, saith<S>559</S> my soul<S>5315</S>; therefore will I hope in him<S>3176</S>.
Jehovah<S>3068</S> is good<S>2896</S> unto them that wait<S>6960</S> for him<S>5315</S>, to the soul that seeketh him<S>1875</S>.
It is good<S>2896</S> that a man should hope<S>3175</S> and quietly wait<S>1748</S> for the salvation<S>8668</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
